SELECT value, atan(value) AS atan_value FROM test_atan;
SELECT value, atan(value) FROM test_atan WHERE value BETWEEN -1 AND 1;
SELECT value, atan(value) AS atan_value FROM test_atan ORDER BY atan_value DESC;
WITH computed_atan AS (SELECT value, atan(value) AS atan_value FROM test_atan) SELECT AVG(atan_value) FROM computed_atan;
SELECT t1.value, t2.value, atan(t1.value + t2.value) AS combined_atan FROM test_atan t1 JOIN test_atan t2 ON t1.value > t2.value;
SELECT a.val, b.value, atan(a.val + b.value) AS combined_atan FROM additional_values a, test_atan b;
SELECT DISTINCT atan(value) FROM test_atan WHERE value IS NOT NULL;
SELECT value, atan(value) AS atan_value FROM test_atan WHERE atan(value) IS NOT NULL;
SELECT AVG(atan(value)) AS average_atan FROM test_atan WHERE value IS NOT NULL;
DELETE FROM test_atan WHERE value = NULL;
SELECT value, atan(value) AS atan_value FROM test_atan WHERE abs(value) < 1;
